features: FIZZ TIME: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak.
DELICIOUSLY SCENTED: Enjoy the fabulous scent of a gentle rose whilst relaxing in a warm bath.
BATH TRIO: Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs, enjoy multiple silky smooth gentle rose scented baths.

BUBBLE FREE: Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the gentle rose fragrance. Relax and enjoy.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Resealable bag. Ready to use, triple pack.
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak. Enjoy the fabulous scent of a gentle rose whilst relaxing in a warm bath. Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs, enjoy multiple silky smooth gentle rose scented baths. Prefer the prefect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the gentle rose fragrance, relax and enjoy. Ready to use, rose fragranced in a resealable bag 450g. Ingredients Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Sulphate, Citric Acid, Paraffinium Liquidum, Sodium Laureth Sulphate, Parfum, CI 26100. Directions Remove from packaging. Add the bath bomb to warm, running bath water, for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath. Safety Warning Use with caution. Do not ingest. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use in case of known allergy to product components. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a doctor if symptoms persist.
